aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Drive aur urgency strong feel hogi

💼 Career: Initiative lene se ek naya door open ho sakta hai

❤️ Love: Direct tone thodi harsh lag sakti hai

💰 Money: Unexpected expense ka signal

🧘 Advice: React karne se pehle observe karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Real strength kabhi kabhi patience me hoti hai
